code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut out = ""
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut nb = b
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    nb = b + 32
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    nb = b - 32
  end
  out = "#{out}#{string.from_byte(nb)}"
  i = i + 1
end

println(out)
